title: Redesign BillItemCard component
acceptance_criteria: Header shows item name (left) + single total amount (right), not allocated/total
Quantity badge shown as small pill ('x2') when qty > 1
Per-person rows show name + amount right-aligned, no progress bars
Delete button positioned at top-right without overlapping content
Card is tappable to edit (onPress navigates to add-item with itemId)
